description: Extract BHZ channel waveform data for GEOFON station GE.BKB from the local SDS archive (/home/ga/seiscomp/var/lib/archive) for the full day of January 1, 2024 (UTC) using the SeisComP scart tool (/home/ga/seiscomp/bin/scart). Save the resulting miniSEED file to /home/ga/extracted_BKB_BHZ.mseed.
